content.rendered: Anurag is the General Manager of the Manageability and Security Group, responsible for business strategy & execution, development and deployment of advanced BMC manageability and firmware security technologies for data center infrastructure. Under Anurag’s leadership, AMI delivers cutting-edge solutions that enhance infrastructure manageability, platform security, and support the evolving needs of cloud, enterprise, and AI-driven workloads. He has 25 years of experience in the high-tech industry with several patents granted by the U.S. Patent Office.
